realtime_memories.content: When user pastes or cats a prompt file, EXECUTE the workflow immediately. Don't summarize, don't ask. User runs parallel terminals from saved prompts in docs/guides/prompts/. Also: do NOT prompt for permission when writing project_memory.json during cleanup hooks. Write silently.
Plugin/agent token overflow fix: keep global plugins under ~50, agent descriptions under 100 chars, to avoid ~15.9k token context overflow.

CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=128000 set in ~/.zshrc. Restart Claude Code to pick up. Needed for writing full papers in one shot. Note: env var is read at launch time only; mid-session changes require restart.

Paper 1 (PoPETs) 0.97 score, submission-ready. Paper 2 CSI entropy (ACM WiSec): main.tex COMPLETE (847 lines, 8 pages ACM sigconf, compiles clean, 23 verified refs, all numbers match pipeline output). Patents 2+3: reorganized into docs/ip/patent-{1,2,3}-*/ with 4-5 separate HTML+MD files each. All claims code-verified.

Full project status report generated (Apr 2): 181 commits, 9 pillars (75-100%), 552 Rust + 429 Python + 30 web + 267 mobile tests, 6 platforms, 3 patents (1 filed), live signaling server, PyPI v0.5.0, 18 TestFlight builds.
